scripts.sync:codex: tsx scripts/sync-agents-to-codex.ts && tsx scripts/sync-rules-to-codex.ts && tsx scripts/sync-templates-to-codex.ts && tsx scripts/sync-examples-to-codex.ts
scripts.sync:codex:json: npm run sync:codex:agents -- --json && npm run sync:codex:rules -- --json && npm run sync:codex:templates -- --json && npm run sync:codex:examples -- --json
scripts.sync:codex:preview: npm run sync:codex:agents -- --preview && npm run sync:codex:rules -- --preview && npm run sync:codex:templates -- --preview && npm run sync:codex:examples -- --preview
scripts.sync:codex:preview:json: npm run sync:codex:agents -- --json --preview && npm run sync:codex:rules -- --json --preview && npm run sync:codex:templates -- --json --preview && npm run sync:codex:examples -- --json --preview
scripts.test:unit: vitest run tests/agents.test.ts tests/rules.test.ts tests/contracts tests/setup-fs.test.ts tests/setup-merge.test.ts tests/setup-orchestrator.test.ts
scripts.verify: npm run validate && npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run test:unit
scripts.test:coverage: vitest run --coverage tests/agents.test.ts tests/rules.test.ts tests/contracts tests/setup-fs.test.ts tests/setup-merge.test.ts tests/setup-orchestrator.test.ts
scripts.validate:json: npm run validate:agents -- --json && npm run validate:rules -- --json && npm run validate:drift -- --json
scripts.validate: npm run validate:agents && npm run validate:rules && npm run validate:drift
